qmd-daemon-health.command: while true; do curl -sf localhost:${QMD_DAEMON_PORT:-8181}/health > /dev/null; sleep 30; done

vault-md-watcher.command: inotifywait -m -r --format '%w%f' -e modify,create,delete,move "${OBSIDIAN_ACTIVE_VAULT}" --include '\.md$' | while read f; do sleep 30; qmd update; done
vault-md-watcher.description: Watch active vault for markdown changes, trigger QMD re-index (debounced 30s)
